project_type: Next.js 16 web application with React 19, dark-theme design system
build_system: npm with Next.js build toolchain, Tailwind v4 (no preflight)
test_framework: No test framework configured; validation via typecheck only
verification_instructions: Run 'npm run typecheck' then 'npm run build' from osai-web directory
contribution_requirements: Use design system tokens from globals.css. Never hardcode hex in components. Use CSS classes from globals.css for typography (text-body, text-caption, text-micro, meta). Use TabsPill or tabs-underline classes for tab patterns.
key_patterns: Design system in globals.css with CSS custom properties. Typography tiers: body=15px, body-sm/caption=13px, micro=12px. Components use className-based styling from globals.css plus inline style objects. TabsPill component wraps Radix tabs for pill-style tabs. .tabs-underline class exists for underline-style tabs. .meta class is for 12px muted text. .text-caption is for 13px text.
directory_structure: osai-web/app/ contains page routes; osai-web/components/ contains shared components; osai-web/components/ui/ has design system primitives (tabs-pill, status-dot); osai-web/lib/ has utilities and API client
